topics.name: ride.requested
topics.description: Published when a rider requests a new ride. Consumed by matching-service to find nearby drivers.

topics.name: driver.location
topics.description: Published by driver-service when a driver sends a GPS heartbeat. Consumed by matching-service for proximity queries.

topics.name: ride.matched
topics.description: Published by matching-service when a driver is matched to a ride request. Consumed by ride-service and driver-service.

topics.name: ride.unmatched
topics.description: Published when no driver is found after all retries.

topics.name: ride.failed
topics.description: Published when a ride fails due to system error.

topics.name: driver.disconnected
topics.description: Published when a driver disconnects and fails to reconnect within 30s.
